pages.text: A horrifying machinery constructed to forcefully rip life force from living beings and convert it into pure $(alien)Entropy Biomass$(). It requires a multi-block chamber led by a $(item)Controller$().
The Controller manages insertions and outputs.
These form the walls of the terrifying prison.

pages.name: Decay Chamber Setup
pages.text: To function, the Controller requires at least one 2-block high pillar of $(item)Decay Chambers$() positioned directly horizontally adjacent to it.
